metadata.description: A single-plugin marketplace for Time Travel — a multi-agent premortem skill for Claude Code that projects plan failure modes across T+3/6/12-month horizons, grounded in real-world analogue cases.

plugins.name: time-travel
plugins.description: Multi-agent premortem: 5–7 stakeholder personas project failure modes across T+3/6/12-month horizons, grounded in real-world analogue cases. Outputs a Confirmed/Inflated/Buried risk classification, tripwires, mitigations, a revised plan with mitigations folded in, and an optional exec one-pager.
